text: Power just went out on Elm St downtown. 107 degrees and no AC. This is not okay. #Dallas #heatwave
my AC died 2 hours ago and oncor says 4-6 hour wait for repairs. i have a 2 year old. someone help
lol dallas in august is basically living on the surface of the sun
Just saw a guy passed out on the sidewalk near Fair Park. Called 911 but they said long wait times
transformer blew on our block. sparks everywhere. whole street is dark. 75217 if anyone else affected
Heading to Northpark Mall just to sit in the AC for free lmao #surviving

oncor outage map is LIT UP red across south dallas. this is dangerous for elderly residents who cant leave
oh wow soooo hot today 🙄 its literally 72 degrees in san francisco rn. miss home
My neighbor just collapsed in her yard. Shes 78. EMTs took forever to get here. This heat is KILLING people
Day 2 no power in 75217. Oncor still showing estimated restore 'TBD'. We slept in the car last night with it running for AC
anyone know if the cooling center at MLK rec center is open today? google says closed but the city website says open
Great brunch at The Rustic today! Mango mimosas are perfection 🥂 #DallasFoodie #WeekendVibes
3 ambulances on MLK Blvd in the last hour. something is very wrong in south dallas today
ICYMI: Cowboys preseason opener this weekend! Who's going?? #CowboysNation #NFL
lights flickering at work again. if this office loses power im going home. 3rd time this week
Elderly man found dead in apartment on Hatcher St. No AC. This is the 3rd one this week per my neighbor who works EMS
just drove past 3 fire trucks on Commerce. hope everyone is ok
its 98 degrees at 9AM. today is going to be brutal. stay inside if you can dallas
Power outage spreading to Oak Cliff now. Oncor crews everywhere but it keeps going out in new areas
my dog wont even go outside to pee. smart dog tbh
Just watched a construction worker stumble and sit down on Ross Ave. His coworkers poured water on him. This heat is no joke @ABOREOSHA
ERCOT asking texans to conserve energy. Maybe if yall built actual infrastructure this wouldn't happen every summer #TexasGrid
water main break at Lamar and Commerce. no water pressure in downtown. on top of the heat this is insane
Just got my electricity bill. $487 for july. FOUR HUNDRED AND EIGHTY SEVEN DOLLARS. for a 1BR apartment.
Check out this amazing sunset from last night! #DallasSkyline #Photography #Beautiful
power flickering in and out at pleasant grove. fridge is gonna go bad. already lost food once this summer
UPDATE: Oncor confirms 12,000+ customers without power in SE Dallas. Crews working but no ETA.
woke up drenched in sweat. power went out sometime overnight. its already 94 in my apartment
The homeless encampment under I-30 has no shade structures. Saw someone from OHS handing out water bottles but thats not enough when its 107
If you think THIS is hot you should try Phoenix 😂 Dallas heat is nothing
Oncor just came and fixed our street! Power back after 3 days! THANK YOU 🙏
two more ambulances on MLK. my ring doorbell caught them. this is the south dallas heat crisis nobody is talking about
PSA: The Salvation Army on Harry Hines is open as a cooling center until 8pm. They have water and snacks. Spread the word
109 degrees at DFW airport. This might be the hottest day of my life and ive lived here 40 years
So thankful for WFH today. My car thermometer said 115 in the parking lot
OUTAGE ALERT: Lost power at Buckner and Military. Whole intersection traffic lights are out too. Be careful driving
Fire at an apartment complex on Illinois Ave. 4 trucks responding. Hope everyone got out ok
Just a reminder that hot cars kill. Please check your back seats. Please check on elderly neighbors. Please take this seriously.
pavement is literally melting on Ross Ave. watched a girls flip flop get stuck lol sorry not funny but also kinda funny
110 DEGREES TODAY????? No. Absolutely not. I refuse.
Grid is struggling again. Brownout in oak cliff — lights dimming every few minutes. Here we go again
Adopting this sweet boy today! Meet Duke 🐕 #AdoptDontShop #DallasDogs #RescueDog
work sent us home early. they said the AC cant keep up and its 89 degrees INSIDE the warehouse. OSHA violation??
Another outage in Pleasant Grove. This is the same grid section that went down last week. @oncaborenergy FIX THIS
saw city trucks setting up what looks like a water station at Pike Park. good.
grandma says she fine but her apartment is 96 degrees and she wont leave. can someone tell me how to get the city to do a welfare check

my outdoor thermometer says 117. i know its in the sun but STILL
friend who works at Parkland ER says they've had 14 heat-related admissions today. Fourteen. And its not even 5pm
3rd straight day over 105. When does this end
Saw a mail carrier looking really rough on Gaston. Red face, stumbling. I brought him water and he sat on my porch for 20 min
if ONE MORE PERSON from california tells me dallas heat is dry heat im going to lose it. ITS NOT. ITS HUMID AND AWFUL
power holding steady today in pleasant grove 🤞 oncor must have fixed something
Anyone else notice more sirens than usual this week? South Dallas has been nonstop ambulances
Happy Friday Dallas! Whos ready for the weekend? Cant wait for the Farmers Market tomorrow morning! #FridayVibes
cooling center at Moorland YMCA is PACKED. standing room only. they need to open more of these
just seen them put a body bag in an ambulance on Hatcher. im sick of this. RIP whoever that was
NWS says excessive heat warning extended through Wednesday. Dallas hasnt been below 100 in 2 weeks.
Okay genuine question — at what point does the city declare this an emergency? How many people have to die?
yo dallas people - whos going to deep ellum tonight? new DJ at It'll Do! 🎶 #DeepEllum #DallasNightlife
Only 104 today. feels like a cold front compared to last week 😅
oncor reporting another 3,000 customers out in south dallas and oak cliff areas
Mom tried to call 311 about a welfare check for her neighbor. On hold for 45 minutes then disconnected. System is broken
Person just collapsed at the bus stop on Ervay. People helping but no shade at that stop. The city needs to add shelters to these stops
the irony of getting a $300 electric bill while also having no electricity for 3 days is not lost on me @oncaborenergy
Just finished a great run on the Katy Trail! 🏃‍♀️ Only 5 miles but felt good! #RunDallas #FitnessJourney
good news - FEMA teams spotted in south dallas handing out fans and water. about time
i swear its hotter in my apartment than outside. this building has ZERO insulation. landlord doesnt care
is it just me or has traffic been insane this week? I think the traffic lights keep going out from power issues
Day 20 straight of triple digits. I genuinely dont remember what normal weather feels like
oncor truck has been parked on our street for 3 hours. they keep looking at the transformer and shaking their heads. not encouraging
UPDATE from my ER friend at Parkland: heat cases down from last week but still seeing 5-6 per day. Most are elderly or homeless
107 again today. Another transformer fire on Lancaster. How many of these have to blow before they upgrade the grid
The most Texas thing ever is watching your neighbor mow his lawn in 107 degree heat while you sit inside questioning his life choices
power out AGAIN in pleasant grove. 4th time in 3 weeks. @CityOfDallas @oncaborenergy this area needs infrastructure investment NOW

Just read someone died on the trails near Katy Trail yesterday. heat related. this is so sad
church on MLK is running a fan drive — drop off box fans and theyre distributing to elderly residents without AC. if you can help please do
honestly its fine. i like sweating through 3 shirts a day. builds character. (help)
Lost power at 2pm. Its 109 outside. I have two cats. This cant keep happening. Heading to petco to sit in the AC with them in carriers
dallas county medical examiner will probably have a report in a few months on heat deaths. bet its way higher than anyone expects
Getting married next month! Venue hunting in Dallas - any recommendations? #DallasWedding #BrideToBe #Engaged
dropped below 100 today for the first time in forever. only 99. the bar is in hell
final count from my block: 3 transformer fires, 6 days without power (total across outages), one neighbor hospitalized for heat exhaustion. this was august 2023 in dallas TX
no power no water the city doesnt care about south dallas and never has. but they sure built that new park downtown real fast
Just tried to make eggs on my car hood as a joke. They actually started cooking. Its 8am.
Selling 2 tickets to the Rangers game Saturday! Section 121 row 15. $80 each OBO. DM me #Rangers #TexasRangers
fire hydrant opened up on cedar crest. kids playing in the water. normally id complain but honestly they need it today
ERCOT: please conserve. Also ERCOT: no we wont invest in grid reliability. pick a lane
i know i complain about the cold in january but i take it all back. give me 30 degrees over 110 any day
weird flex but our office AC is set to 68 and its the only reason i come to work anymore
neighbor told me they found someone dead in a car on Military Pkwy this morning. car was off, windows up. please check on people
Oncor outage map for 75215 and 75217 has been red for THREE WEEKS STRAIGHT. These are the lowest income zips in Dallas. Coincidence? No.
literally saw heat waves coming off the road on Buckner Blvd. like a movie. except its real life and people are dying
yall are so dramatic. its summer. in texas. its hot. this happens every year. drink water and move on 🤷‍♂️
Props to the Dallas firefighters i saw checking on the homeless camp under 45. they were handing out water in full gear. Heroes
NWS excessive heat warning: heat index expected to reach 115-120 in parts of Dallas County today. Limit outdoor activity.
comp had a heat related event on ervay st. saw the whole thing. guy just went down. scary
